titleStmt.title: SII 38.49: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 49. (A.R. No. 49 of 1912.) GUḌIVĀḌA, SRUNGAVARAPPUKOTA TALUK, VIZAGAPATAM DISTRICT. On the wall, ardhamaṇḍapa, Brahmaliṅgasvāmin temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year Śaka 1362, Raudri, Chaitra śu. di. 10, Thursday = irregular.

summary.p: It records that the construction of dancing hall (nāṭyamaṇḍapa), wall (bhādra), nandimaṇḍapa and also a temple for the god Mallikārjuna. It also refers to the installation of nandistambha and the digging of a tank, called brahmasāgara, and laying of a garden. Also it mentions the construction of a sweetwater well and a stone wall around it. It also records the construction of the Chōḷēśvara temple and the installation of the image of Vīnāyaka and also the sculpture of Garuḍa in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1362 gunēṭi raudrasaṁvvatsara caitra śu 10
guruvarana koṁḍḍa suśubrahēśvaradēvaraku . nāṭyamaṁḍḍapabbu gaṭṭiṁcci
suṁnnaṁbu śeyiṁce . cāmara pratriyalu jeyyaṁcci śiṁggana perānu
basuvanaperānu varuniniśapu dakṣaṇabhadraṁbhuganiṁcci tū
¨rpuna naṁddimaṁḍḍapaṁbu gaṭṭiṁcci . Ānagari vuttarabhāgānacinama
likā¨rjuna nagaru gaḍḍiṁci sunnaṁbu ceyyiṁccenu . tū¨rpuna nadikaṁbhaṁ
bhu nilipi . cērvu travviṁcci brahmasāgaraṁbanu pēru peṭṭēnu
vuttarābhāgāna doṁṭapeṭṭiṁcci pekku phalavṛkṣālu veyiṁ
ccenu . la kumavarapugōṭa dakṣiṇabhāgāna tiyyanuyya tavviṁ
cci rokaṭṭaṇaṁ gaṭṭiṁccenu . sāsanagaṁbhaṁmu nilipenu coḷēśvaraliṁganaku
dakṣiṇabhāgāna . bādraṁ gaṁṭṭiṁcci vināyakuni pratiṣṭha śēyiṁ
ccenu . śrīgarāvallabhunilē garutmaṁtuni jeIṁcci pratiṣṭhaceIṁccenu
tirumaya pravatṛṁḍḍu suvadāruṁḍḍu
pāvanuṁḍḍu . maṁgaḷamahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 38.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
